description_short: Cyclodehydration of acylated phenethylamines to dihydroisoquinolines or isoquinolines.

mechanism_type: intramolecular [1,2]- or [1,n]-silyl shift via pentacoordinate silicon
key_reagents_clue: alkoxide or organolithium generation, acyl silanes, THF
common_conditions: strong-base-promoted migration from carbon to oxygen
description_short: Anionic migration of silyl groups from carbon to oxygen that enables rearrangement and annulation logic.

mechanism_type: concerted four-centered addition of B-H across a pi bond
description_short: Regio- and stereoselective addition of borane to alkenes or alkynes to form versatile organoboranes.

mechanism_type: carbene or metal-carbenoid cyclopropanation followed by electrocyclic ring opening
common_conditions: thermal or rhodium-catalyzed Buchner ring expansion of arenes
description_short: Arene ring expansion via carbene addition and norcaradiene/cycloheptatriene rearrangement.

mechanism_type: oxidative addition, amido/alkoxo palladium formation, reductive elimination
key_reagents_clue: Pd catalysts, BINAP, dppf, XANTPHOS, NaOtBu, Cs2CO3
common_conditions: base-promoted palladium-catalyzed amination or etherification of aryl halides/sulfonates
description_short: Ligand-controlled palladium-catalyzed formation of aryl C-N and C-O bonds from aryl electrophiles.
